name: Los Angeles Unified School District
about: Los Angeles Unified School District (LAUSD) is the second-largest school district in the United States, serving approximately 420,000 students across more than 1,000 schools in the Los Angeles area.
calendarNotes: LAUSD operates a traditional semester calendar district-wide, but also has a significant number of year-round schools — if your child attends a year-round campus, their calendar will differ substantially from this page. Spring Break in LAUSD runs in late March. The district observes Cesar Chavez Day on March 31 as a school holiday, which is unique to California and not commonly observed outside the state. Winter Break runs approximately two weeks, from late December through early January. With over 1,000 schools across a vast metro area, always double-check your child's specific school calendar, as site-level schedules can occasionally differ from the district standard.
